title: becium stirbeyi
intro: Becium stirbeyi, also known as "African blue basil", is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in Africa and known for its distinct blue flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Becium stirbeyi include reducing inflammation, relieving stress and anxiety, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Becium stirbeyi can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its essential oil in aromatherapy to promote relaxation.
